name: Import payment + working-capital account (cross-border supplier T/T + cycle financing)
comment: Full-scale combined-agent test. Demand scores deliberately aligned to cited evidence axis values (sync-bridge discipline); segment confidence is Low per SEG-uae-importers-upfront-pay upgrade condition.

pain_severity.basis: EV-2026-W28-013 (sev 3, fee/FX opacity), EV-2026-W28-015 (sev 4, financing cost), EV-2026-W28-014 (sev 3) — real but not existential

financial_impact.basis: EV-2026-W28-013 (AED ~105-130/transfer + 1.5-2.8% FX spread), EV-2026-W28-015 (LATR 8-15% p.a. or self-funding the 30-90d gap)

workaround_cost.basis: EV-2026-W28-013 provider-hopping, EV-2026-W28-014 escrow/wire adaptations, EV-2026-W28-015 LATR gated by collateral

switching_intent.basis: EV-2026-W28-013/014/015 switching axes 3/2/2 — searching-for-alternatives on fees only; cheap rails already exist (Wio, Wise, exchange houses). Transfer-cost switching alone is weak; the credit must carry the wedge

willingness_to_pay.basis: Fees paid today (revealed, EV-2026-W28-013); LATR 8-15% paid at mechanism level (EV-2026-W28-015) — but UAE-importer-level WTP explicitly unverified in EV-015

digital_readiness.basis: Digital by trade necessity (platform escrow, T/T); segment marked mixed

payment_volume.basis: Typical orders exceed card caps ($12-15k) per EV-2026-W28-014 — volume band per merchant unverified

credit_need.basis: Pay-upfront/collect-30-90d gap is the segment definition — but SEG-uae-importers-upfront-pay is Low confidence pending first-person accounts

botim_distribution_advantage.basis: BOTIM already operates consumer remittance corridors (incl. the rails EV-2026-W28-018 criticises); business-user overlap unknown

transaction_data_advantage.basis: Sees supplier-payment flow if routed; goods-in-transit and money-in side invisible without account adoption

payment_revenue_potential.basis: FX margin real but competed down (Wise from 0.31%, Wio AED 35-40) — transparent-pricing wedge caps the take

lending_revenue_potential.basis: 60-75 day cycles, real balances, priced against LATR 8-15% and MCA class (RC-4)

credit_risk_visibility.basis: Outbound flow visible; repayment depends on money-in we may not see; goods-in-transit risk structural

competitive_defensibility.basis: IP-2026-002: CredibleX ($100M facility) and Comfi ($65M) deploying capital NOW; banks own LATR. BOTIM edge is below-the-floor reach + owned corridor rails - narrow

ease_of_validation.basis: Importers reachable via trade communities; VE-004 doubles as Workstream A's segment-confidence upgrade instrument

mvp_feasibility_7wk.basis: Concierge feasible: manual FX transfer on existing BOTIM rails + manual financing on AstraTech licence — but EV-2026-W28-018 shows our own transfer execution must be fixed first
